title: Tala Cocktail Strainer, Stainless Steel Drinks Strainer for Making Cocktails, Professional Grade and Perfect for Home use or for Themed Events
availability_text: Only 8 left in stock (more on the way).
features: ULTIMATE TOOL: This Tala Cocktail Strainer is ultimate bar accessory to use when making cocktails, not only does it do a great job but it also looks the part
STRAINER: This Strainer accesory prevents ice, fruit and herbs from being poured into shaken drink so that you can ensure you drink has been infused bit not overpower the drink
Stainless Steel: Made using the best materials this drinks strainer is made with Stainless steel to give a polished metal look
TRADITIONAL SHAPED: Shaped to fit over a full range of glasses while straining, made for home used but perfect for use on themed nights

MASTERS OF BARWARE: The Tala Barware collection includes a diverse range of bar accessories from ice cube trays to corkscrews. Enjoy with friends and family in the comfort of your own home. Established in 1899, Tala has become a trusted source of high-quality kitchenware, bakeware, and cookware
